summary: Iteration 39 - Bug fixes verification: Ghost skills fix, French accents in CvAnalysisSection, new Job Matching filters (lieu_residence, salaire_minimum)

issues: Console warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement (existing issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: 1) Ghost skills fix - allSkills useMemo filters by valid sources only, 2) French accents present in CvAnalysisSection, 3) New Job Matching filters lieu_residence and salaire_minimum exist with proper data-testid attributes, 4) Backend API accepts new filter fields

ghost_skills_fix.details: ParticulierView.jsx lines 84-106: allSkills useMemo now filters passport competences by valid sources only (dclic_pro, ia_detectee, analyse_cv, centres_interet). Empty state message shown when no CV analyzed.

french_accents_fix.details: CvAnalysisSection.jsx contains proper French accents: critères, complété, données, Sélectionnez, modèle, ciblée, compétences, etc.

job_matching_lieu_residence_filter.details: Filter exists with data-testid='filter-lieu-residence' in JobMatchingSection.jsx. Backend accepts lieu_residence field in CandidateSearchProfile model.

job_matching_salaire_minimum_filter.details: Filter exists with data-testid='filter-salaire-min' in JobMatchingSection.jsx. Backend accepts salaire_minimum field in CandidateSearchProfile model.

backend_api_new_filters.details: POST /api/jobs/matching/search accepts lieu_residence and salaire_minimum fields. All 9 pytest tests passed.

salary_display_in_job_cards.details: JobMatchingSection.jsx line 809 shows salary with data-testid='salary-{idx}' pattern when salaire_indicatif is present in AI-generated offers.

code_review_verification.ParticulierView.jsx: Lines 84-106: Ghost skills fix implemented correctly with validSources Set filtering
code_review_verification.CvAnalysisSection.jsx: French accents present throughout the file
code_review_verification.JobMatchingSection.jsx: DEFAULT_FILTERS includes lieu_residence and salaire_minimum. FilterRow components added for both. buildSearchPayload sends new fields.
code_review_verification.models.py: CandidateSearchProfile includes zone_geographique, distance_km, lieu_residence, salaire_minimum fields
code_review_verification.routes/jobs.py: _generate_ai_offers includes lieu_residence and salaire_minimum in AI prompt context. all_filter_keys updated.
